name: IFICI variant - high income (€80,000)
description: IFICI regime (20% flat rate on taxable income) for high income taxpayer. Specific deduction: max(€4,104, €8,800) = €8,800. Taxable: €71,200. Demonstrates significant tax savings vs standard regime (23% vs 40%)

sources.description: IFICI flat 20% rate applied to taxable income after mandatory dedução específica. Social security unchanged at 11%.
sources.notes: Specific Deduction: max(€4104, 80000*0.11) = max(€4104, €8800) = €8800; Taxable: €80000 - €8800 = €71200; IRS (IFICI): €71200*0.20=€14240; SS: 80000*0.11=8800; Total deductions: 23040; Net: 56960; Effective rate: 23040/80000=0.288. Compare to standard regime: IRS would be €23301 (31% vs 20% marginal benefit).
